w:r.w:t: #queue-overlay { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(10, 10, 20, 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 999999; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

#queue-box { position: relative; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(40px); border-radius: 32px; padding: 48px 56px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 32px 64px -16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); max-width: 440px; min-width: 380px; overflow: hidden; transform: scale(0.95); transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

#queue-box::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 50%, #f093fb 100%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: gradientShift 3s ease infinite; }
#queue-emoji { font-size: 72px; margin-bottom: 24px; animation: float 2s ease-in-out infinite; filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3)); }
@keyframes float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: translateY(-12px) rotate(5deg); } }

#queue-position { font-size: 64px; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 50%, #f093fb 100%); background-size: 200% 200%; -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; margin-bottom: 16px; letter-spacing: -2px; animation: gradientFlow 4s ease infinite; filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4)); }
#queue-message { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 32px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; }

#queue-spinner { width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-top-color: #667eea; border-right-color: #764ba2; border-bottom-color: #f093fb; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) infinite; margin: 0 auto; filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3)); }
#queue-box .particles { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; }

#queue-box .particle { position: absolute; width: 4px; height: 4px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6), transparent); border-radius: 50%; animation: particleFloat 6s ease-in-out infinite; }

@keyframes particleFloat { 0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(0); opacity: 0; } 10% { opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(var(--tx), var(--ty)) scale(1); opacity: 0; } }`;

How to Use StealthWriter

description" class="text-muted-foreground text-sm md:text-base">Quick guide to using our AI Humanizer
1

Generate Quality Content

Start by generating text using high-quality AI generators like the latest models from OpenAI or Claude. Focus on writing quality content first. Avoid excessive listing or numerous headlines as they can trigger AI detection.

2

Clean Your Text

Remove any markdown formatting and HTML tags. StealthWriter works best with plain text, so ensure your content is clean and formatted simply.

3

Select Your Model

Choose between Ninja or Ghost models. Ghost generally provides higher quality results and better detection scores, while Ninja offers a good balance of speed and performance.

4

Choose Humanization Level

Select a level from 1 to 10. Level 1 provides basic humanization (similar to paraphrasing), while level 10 offers advanced humanization. We recommend starting with level 7 and adjusting as needed. Lower levels typically have better grammar.

5

Humanize Your Text

Click the Humanize button to process your text. You'll see the humanized content with a predicted AI detection score. The tool highlights sentences based on their likelihood of being detected as AI-generated.

6

Test Your Results

Test your text on various AI detection tools such as GPTZero, Originality AI, Winston AI, Turnitin, ZeroGPT, and others. Always ensure your detection score

is low in StealthWriter before testing elsewhere.

7

Experiment and Refine

Try different levels, models, and input text variations. Each text is unique and may require a different approach. Both AI detectors and humanizers have limitations, so some trial and error may be needed.

Need Help? Contact us via live chat or join our Discord community for support.

Changelog
Recent updates and changes to the system

v4.2.6 (04/10/2025)

  • AI detector algorithm update and tuning for improved accuracy
  • Improved on the humanizer

v4.2.5 (02/10/2025)

  • Further optimized humanization algorithm to ensure compatibility with the latest Originality AI update
  • Updated strict AI detector to detect content from newest AI models including Grok 4, GPT-5, and Claude Sonnet 4.5

v4.2.4 (22/09/2025)

  • Changed pricing structure, instead of deducting words, we deduct based on humanization attempts.
  • New plan breakdown (humanization attempts and limits):
  • Free: Ghost Mini 10/day; Ghost Pro not included;

Max words per humanization: 1,000; Generator access: No; Major AI detector verification: Yes; Priority support: No.
  • Basic: Ghost Mini unlimited; Ghost Pro 20/day; Max words per humanization: 2,000; Generator access: Yes; Major AI detector verification: Yes; Priority support: No.
  • Standard: Ghost Mini unlimited; Ghost Pro 50/day; Max words per humanization: 3,000; Generator access: Yes; Major AI detector verification: Yes; Priority support: No.
  • Premium: Ghost Mini unlimited; Ghost Pro unlimited; Max words per humanization: 5,000; Generator access: Yes; Major AI detector verification: Yes; Priority support: Yes. (Best Option)
  • UI changes
  • Fixed sign up and login errors
  • Performance updates

    • v4.2.3 (15/09/2025)

    • Improvements on detector mode (strict) in Humanizer and Detector. (strict mode is better now)

    v4.2.2 (06/09/2025)

    • Changed AI detection sensitivity.
    • Detector mode in Humanizer changed to Easy by default.
    • You can now edit the original sentence before reloading alternatives.

    v4.2.1 (06/09/2025)

    • Improved AI detection
    • Minor bug fixes

    v4.2 (31/08/2025)

    • Optimized humanization algorithms for more natural, human-like content generation

    v4.1 (30/08/2025)

    • Released Ghost 4.7 Pro & Ghost 4.7 Mini
    • Ghost 4.7: Enhanced version of Ghost 4.6 with significantly improved quality and undetectability

slot="separator" class="bg-border shrink-0 data-[orientation=horizontal]:h-px data-[orientation=horizontal]:w-full data-[orientation=vertical]:h-full data-[orientation=vertical]:w-px mt-3">

v4.0 (27/08/2025)

  • Removed all old models and introduced new Ghost 4.6 Pro & Ghost 4.6 Mini models
  • New models are significantly improved and bypass humanizer detectors more effectively
  • Faster processing speeds across all features
  • Reduced errors throughout the platform for better stability
  • Major improvements on AI detection accuracy
  • Better text format understanding and preservation
  • Multiple bug fixes for enhanced reliability
  • Increased text limit per request for all plans - check pricing page for details
  • UI improvements for better user experience
  • Added new guide for achieving best results
  • Significantly improved text styling - styles now produce much better results
  • Added "Improve Readability" style which enhances overall text quality
  • Refined humanization levels for better control
  • Removed editor feature - focusing on core functionality
  • Simplified advanced options - the model now handles many settings automatically
  • Added sentence analysis section showing top AI and human sentences

v3.9 (08/08/2025)

  • Massive performance improvements across the platform
  • AI Detector is now 2x faster for quicker analysis
  • Humanizer processing speed increased by 2x for faster results
  • Multiple bug fixes for enhanced stability
  • Reduced errors throughout the application for smoother user experience

v3.8 (16/06/2025)

  • Added Style Selection feature to humanizer - change the writing style of your text during humanization!
  • New available styles: Academic, Formal, Simple, Casual, University Professor, University Student, High School Student
  • Added helpful tooltip explaining that style changes take longer than normal humanization
  • Improved user interface with better guidance and tooltips for all features

v3.7 (14/06/2025)

  • Released new Ghost 4.3 & Ninja 4.3 Models - optimized for quality and SEO content creation!
  • 4.3 Models: Perfect for high-quality, readable content but may be detected by advanced AI detectors.
  • Released new Ghost 4.4 & Ninja 4.4

Models - optimized for maximum undetectability!
  • 4.4 Models: Designed to bypass even the most advanced AI detection systems.
  • Enhanced model stability and reduced processing time across all new versions.

    • v3.6 (11/06/2025)

    • Added new Ghost 4.2 & Ninja 4.2 Models - our most advanced models yet!
    • Bug Fixes across the platform.
    • Improvement on AI Detector accuracy and performance.
    • Improved server stability for better reliability.

    v3.5 (06/05/2025)

    • Major model improvements: All models now produce higher quality, more readable, and grammatically correct text.
    • Brand new, faster, and more accurate AI detector!
    • Alternatives now show their impact on the AI score and provide more coherent sentences.
    • You can now choose a specific model and level when picking alternatives or using "Humanize More".
    • Better sentence highlight colors based on impact.
    • UI optimizations for a smoother experience.
    • Fixed password reset bug.
    • Improved server stability—no more unexpected errors!

    v3.4 (12/02/2025)

    • Added new model: MultiLang 3.0, a humanizer that supports multiple languages.
    • Bug Fixes like the Verification Captcha.
    • UI changes to Detector page.

    v3.3 (30/01/2025)

    • Each model now provides 4 alternatives to choose from.
    • Optimized all for better grammar and formating.
    • Optimized 3.2 models to perform better on Turnitin and Copyleaks.

    v3.2 (24/01/2025)
